content.json:
# Virtual WAN — Hub Health & Routing Overview
**Theme:** vWAN traffic analysis · **Data source:** `AzureDiagnostics` (ResourceType `VIRTUALHUBS`) + `AzureMetrics`.

Virtual hub event activity, routing/BGP status, and per-hub throughput.

> Requires diagnostic settings on the Virtual WAN hubs. Categories vary by deployment — verify against your hubs.

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VIRTUALHUBS' | summarize Events=count(), LastEvent=max(TimeGenerated) by Resource, Category | sort by Events desc
content.title: Events by hub & category

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VIRTUALHUBS' and (Category has 'Route' or Message has_any ('BGP', 'route')) | summarize Count=count() by Resource, Message | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Routing / BGP status messages

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == 'VIRTUALHUBS' | summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Resource | render timechart
content.title: Hub event volume over time

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and Resource has 'HUB' and MetricName has 'Bytes' | summarize Bytes=sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), MetricName | render timechart
content.title: Hub throughput (bytes) over time
